info.title: ServiceBusToolset.CLI
info.description:
Copyright (C) 2026 Gagik Kyurkchyan
dump-dlq                 Export DLQ messages to a JSON file
purge-dlq                Purge messages from a dead letter queue
resubmit-dlq             Resubmit messages from a dead letter queue back to
the main queue
diagnose-dlq             Diagnose DLQ messages by correlating with Application
Insights telemetry
monitor-queues           Monitor Service Bus queue statistics in a
live-updating console table
monitor-subscriptions    Monitor Service Bus topic subscription statistics in
a live-updating console table
help                     Display more information on a specific command.
version                  Display version information.

commands.name: dump-dlq
commands.description: Export DLQ messages to a JSON file

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
Required. Fully qualified Service Bus namespace (e.g.,
mynamespace.servicebus.windows.net)

options.name: --before
options.description:
Only include messages enqueued before this UTC datetime
(ISO 8601 format)

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
(Default: false) Preview message count without writing
to file

options.name: --interactive
options.description:
(Default: false) Interactive mode: show categories and
select which to dump

options.name: --merge-similar
options.description:
(Default: false) Merge similar DLQ categories using
LCS-based clustering (interactive mode only)

options.name: --categorize-by
options.description:
Properties to categorize by. #Prop for system (falls
back to application properties), $Prop for body.
Default: #Subject,#DeadLetterReason

commands.name: purge-dlq
commands.description: Purge messages from a dead letter queue

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
Required. Fully qualified Service Bus namespace (e.g.,
mynamespace.servicebus.windows.net)

options.name: --before
options.description:
Only purge messages enqueued before this UTC datetime
(ISO 8601 format)

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: (Default: false) Preview message count without purging

options.name: --interactive
options.description:
(Default: false) Interactive mode: show categories and
select which to purge

options.name: --merge-similar
options.description:
(Default: false) Merge similar DLQ categories using
LCS-based clustering (interactive mode only)

options.name: --categorize-by
options.description:
Properties to categorize by. #Prop for system (falls
back to application properties), $Prop for body.
Default: #Subject,#DeadLetterReason

commands.name: resubmit-dlq
commands.description:
Resubmit messages from a dead letter queue back to
the main queue

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
Required. Fully qualified Service Bus namespace (e.g.,
mynamespace.servicebus.windows.net)

options.name: --before
options.description:
Only resubmit messages enqueued before this UTC datetime
(ISO 8601 format)

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
(Default: false) Preview message count without
resubmitting

options.name: --interactive
options.description:
(Default: false) Interactive mode: show categories and
select which to resubmit

options.name: --target-queue
options.description:
Target queue to resubmit messages to (defaults to source
queue)

options.name: --target-topic
options.description:
Target topic to resubmit messages to (defaults to source
topic)

options.name: --merge-similar
options.description:
(Default: false) Merge similar categories by replacing
parameterized values (GUIDs, numbers) with wildcards

options.name: --categorize-by
options.description:
Properties to categorize by. #Prop for system (falls
back to application properties), $Prop for body.
Default: #Subject,#DeadLetterReason

commands.name: diagnose-dlq
commands.description:
Diagnose DLQ messages by correlating with Application
Insights telemetry

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
Required. Fully qualified Service Bus namespace (e.g.,
mynamespace.servicebus.windows.net)

options.name: --output
options.description:
Output JSON file path (optional, prints to console if
not specified)

options.name: --before
options.description:
Only include messages enqueued before this UTC datetime
(ISO 8601 format)

options.name: --max-messages
options.description: (Default: 1000) Maximum number of messages to diagnose

options.name: --interactive
options.description:
(Default: false) Interactive mode: show categories and
select which to diagnose

options.name: --merge-similar
options.description:
(Default: false) Merge similar DLQ categories using
LCS-based clustering (interactive mode only)

options.name: --categorize-by
options.description:
Properties to categorize by. #Prop for system (falls
back to application properties), $Prop for body.
Default: #Subject,#DeadLetterReason

commands.name: monitor-queues
commands.description:
Monitor Service Bus queue statistics in a
live-updating console table

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
Required. Fully qualified Service Bus namespace
(e.g., mynamespace.servicebus.windows.net)

options.name: --filter
options.description:
Queue name filter (wildcards * and ? supported, or
contains match)

commands.name: monitor-subscriptions
commands.description:
Monitor Service Bus topic subscription statistics in
a live-updating console table

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
Required. Fully qualified Service Bus namespace
(e.g., mynamespace.servicebus.windows.net)

options.name: --topic
options.description:
Topic name filter (wildcards * and ? supported, or
contains match)

options.name: --subscription
options.description:
Subscription name filter (wildcards * and ?
supported, or contains match)

commands.name: help
commands.description: Display more information on a specific command.
